WHITE WHO IS YAZZMEEN MIMS' MOTHER IS APPOINTED GUARDIAN AD LITEM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
